case_title: ARLENE CAMPBELL VS. CARLOS ORTIZ et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-11-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-15-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

***CASE DISMISSED*** REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-17-2012 - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: CYNTHIA LEE; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
